overview: A complete premium printing press website for MD Printing Press (Project Bind Wala) in Noida. Features a conversion-focused public site with services showcase, portfolio gallery, testimonials, instant quote form, and WhatsApp integration — plus a full admin dashboard for managing orders, quotes, content, portfolio images, and services.
features: Premium public website with hero, services, portfolio, and testimonials
Instant quote form with lead capture and order tracking
Floating WhatsApp button linked to business number
Secure admin dashboard with Internet Identity login
Full content management — edit all website text from admin
Quote & order management with status tracking
Portfolio image upload and gallery management
Testimonials manager with realistic local placeholders
SEO-optimized with JSON-LD schema and local Noida keywords
